category_sources: Official author page describes Fairy-Max as an AI/engine for user-defined chess variants.
source_facts.description says Fairy-Max is AI for playing chess variants.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage title and official author page use `Fairy-Max`.
docs_sources: Official author-maintained Fairy-Max page provides downloads, setup, rules, pieces, and usage notes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; the official/author-linked chess programming references identify H.G. Muller's hgm.nubati.net GitWeb `fairymax.git` as the source repository.
tags_sources: Official author page says Fairy-Max is designed to run as a WinBoard/XBoard protocol engine.
